sections.label: THINKING
sections.content:
Clicking on the center of the bottom-right grid had no impact at all (no animation, no change). So the center cells are not interactive.
Let me reconsider the problem. I've tried:
1. Matching BR outer to BL pattern - no completion
2. Matching BR outer to TL pattern - no completion
Both times, the center pattern stayed the same. The center pattern can't be changed by clicking.
Maybe the goal isn't to match one specific grid. Let me think about what's different between the three source grids and what the BR grid currently is.
Current BR: outer = TL pattern, center = TR pattern
Maybe the goal is to have BR match TR completely? Let me check:
TR: outer = b R b / R ? R / R R b
BR: outer = b R b / R ? b / b R R
To match TR outer:
- (36,36): b→b (same)
- (36,44): R→R (same)
- (36,52): b→b (same)
- (44,36): R→R (same)
- (44,52): b→R (click)
- (52,36): b→R (click)
- (52,44): R→b (click)
- (52,52): R→b (click)
So 4 clicks to match TR outer. And BR center already matches TR center.
Let me try this!
